{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "8d214841495e4a0a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Tutorial 05.1 - add_primitive_segments, PrimitiveConfig, primitive_config_wrapper, DeviceConfig, calculate_minimum_definitive_differences"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b8cb8d2673bd3b04",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "870dd5b36ab98073",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:50.433515600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:49.974325600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2f71f030a4f5410d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "613345ff1adab01e",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:50.453646400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:50.433515600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "81c77f517ebad715",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:54.456965400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:50.454754900Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:54.913286800Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:54.481669900Z"
    }
   },
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": [
    "standardized_data.plot(x=\"Test_Time[s]\", y=\"Current[A]\", figsize=(20, 5))\n",
    "standardized_data.plot(x=\"Test_Time[s]\", y=\"Voltage[V]\", figsize=(20, 5))"
   ],
   "id": "80df8d8f7da15d45",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='Test_Time[s]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 2000x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 2000x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3a0acd7aef27f0b2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 1: Add primitive segments"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "12b421d5caded5c0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "\"add_primitive_segments\" segments the data into quasi-linear segments (constant current, constant voltage, power ramp, ...)."
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "2007765bcb81c6d3",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:55.809857300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:54.920470500Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "segmented_data = eet.add_primitive_segments(df=standardized_data, config=eet.PrimitiveConfig.OCV_ANALYSIS_DEFAULT)"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "126af180fb4f4a5c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "It adds the following columns to the dataframe:"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "b15580e8ffbd841b",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:55.824050500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:55.810527100Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "added_cols = [c for c in segmented_data.columns if c not in standardized_data.columns]\n",
    "added_cols"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "['Power[W]',\n",
       " 'ID',\n",
       " 'Variable',\n",
       " 'Duration',\n",
       " 'Length',\n",
       " 'Min',\n",
       " 'Max',\n",
       " 'Avg',\n",
       " 'Type',\n",
       " 'Direction',\n",
       " 'Slope']"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 6,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 6
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",

    }
   },
   "source": [
    "segmented_data[added_cols].tail(6)"

    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-info\">\n",
